ROOT.OpCod.h: MLT , 0 SUB , 1 ADD , 2 DIV , 3 REM , 4 RSLTAND , 5 RSLTOR , 6 XOR , 7 NOT , 8 SHR , 9 SHL , 10 AND , 11 F_OR , 12 UNARY_NOT , 13 RSLTE , 14 RSLTA , 15 RSLTAE , 16 RSLTB , 17 RSLTBE , 18 RSLTNE , 19 MOV , 20 CMP , 21 JMP , 22 JMP_LABEL , 23 JMP_EOL , 24 JNZ , 25 JNZ_EOL , 26 JZ , 27 JZ_EOL , 28 SPADD , 29 GETINDX , 30 SETINDX , 31 SET_COMM , 32 GET_COMM , 33 SYSSUBJ , 34 EOL , 35 FREE_VAC , 36 USRSUBJ , 37 USRSUBRT , 38 LINK , 39 FORITR , 40 RESET_VM , 41 TRY , 42 ENDTRY , 43 UNARY_MINUS , 44 SET_COMM_E , 45 GET_COMM_E , 46
ROOT.CompilerSetup.ini:
[Program Limits] TextSpace=30000 CodeSpace=30000 MaxUserFuncs=50 MaxUserVars=100 NameLength=12 StackDepth=280 DataSpace=2048 UserProgMaxSize=131071
[Automatic Routines] AUTOEXEC=0 AUTO_ER=1 AUTO_STOP=2 AUTO_BG=3 AUTO_RLS=4 AUTO_FLS=5 AUTO_ENA=6 AUTO_I1=7 AUTO_I2=8 AUTO_I3=9 AUTO_I4=10 AUTO_I5=11 AUTO_I6=12 AUTO_HM=13 AUTO_HY=14 AUTO_PERR=15
ROOT.Text_10: 1 , Don't Update 2 , Bad Command 3 , Bad Index 4 , PAL Does not support this sensor 5 , Not used error code 5 6 , Not used error code 6 7 , Mode cannot be started - bad initialization data 8 , Not used error code 8 9 , CAN message HW buffer was overrun 10 , Can not be used by PDO 11 , Cannot write to flash memory 12 , Not used error code 12 13 , Cannot reset communication - UART is busy 14 , Not used error code 14 15 , Not used error code 15 16 , Array '[ ]' is expected, or empty expression in array 17 , Format of UL command is not valid - check the command definition 18 , Empty Assign 19 , Command syntax error 20 , Bad Set Point sending order 21 , Operand Out of Range 22 , Zero Division 23 , Command can not be assigned 24 , Bad Operation 25 , Command Not Valid While Moving 26 , Profiler mode not supported in this unit mode (UM) 27 , Bad ECAM setting, refer to EE[6] 28 , Out Of Limit Range 29 , CAN set object return an abort when called from interpreter 30 , No program to continue 31 , Object does not exist or returned an error 32 , Communication overrun, parity, noise, or framing error 33 , Bad sensor setting, check CA[18], CA[19] 34 , There is a conflict with another command 35 , Max bus voltage (BV) or max current (MC) is not valid 36 , Commutation method (CA[17]) or commutation table does not fit to sensor 37 , Hall sensors are defined to the same place, check CA[4],CA[5] or CA[6] 38 , PORT C mux is with conflict with other GO[] or cannot be assigned to the output 39 , Motion start specified for the past 40 , In Wizard Experiment! 41 , Command is not supported by this product 42 , Label was not detected in the User Progam 43 , CAN state machine in fault(Obj 0x6041 in DS402) 44 , Comma character - don't use as an error code 45 , An Attempt to read a write only command 46 , May Not Use Multicapture Homing Mode With Stop Event 47 , Program does not exist or not Compiled 48 , Motor could not start - fault reason in EE[5] 49 , Ecam must be disabled during init (RM=0) 50 , Stack Overflow 51 , Inhibit OR Abort inputs are active, Cannot start motor 52 , PVT Queue Full 53 , Only For Current 54 , Bad Data Base 55 , Bad Context 56 , The product grade does not support this command 57 , Motor Must be Off (MO=0) 58 , Servo (SO) must be on 59 , Semicolon - don't use as an error code 60 , Bad Unit Mode 61 , Data Base Reset 62 , Socket change not allowed while capture is enabled 63 , Question mark character don't use as error code 64 , Can not set the index of an active table 65 , Disabled By SW 66 , Amplifier Not Ready 67 , Recorder Is Busy or data is uploaded 68 , Required profiler mode is not supported 69 , Recorder Usage Error 70 , Recorder data Invalid 71 , Homing is busy 72 , Modulo range must be even 73 , Socket Profiler must be stopped before setting its position 74 , Bad profile database see EE[2] or 0x2081 for the failed object number 75 , DL is in progress 76 , Error mapping is not allowed while Homing is in progress (HM[1]\HF[1]) 77 , Buffer Too Large 78 , Out of Program Range 79 , Sensor setting error, possible conflict with other socket settings 80 , In DC mode and no speed sensor, need to disable the dynamic brake 81 , Download failed see specific error in EE[3] 82 , Program Is Running 83 , Command is not permitted in a program 84 , The System Is Not In Point To Point Mode 85 , STO is not active OR During STO Diagnostic 86 , PVT table is soon going to underflow 87 , Hall sensed with illegal value, may be not connected 88 , Event type HM[3],HF[3] is et to wrong value 89 , Wrong after event behavior. HM[4],HF[4] is set to wrong value 90 , Wrong after event setting, HM[5]=1 is not supported 91 , Sensor select HF[10] is set to wrong value 92 , HF cannot be enabled on main position feedback, if configured to set main position (HF[5]< 2) 93 , HF cannot be enabled on socket with not initialized sensor Vlad19122019 94 , Not allowed while Error mapping (PC[1]) is in progress 95 , ER[3] Too large for modulo setting applied 96 , User program time out 97 , RS232 receive buffer overflow 98 , Current offsets are beyond the allowed limit 99 , The sensor does not support this command 100 , The requested PWM multiplication value is not supported 101 , Absolute encoder setting problem 102 , Output Compare (OC[1] \ OC[21]) or Emulation (EA[1]) are busy 103 , Output Compare Sensor Is Not QUAD Enc 104 , Output Compare Table Length OR Data 105 , Speed loop KP out of range 106 , Position loop KP out of range 107 , Encoder emulation parameters do not match - refer to EE[7] 108 , Encoder emulation (EA[1]) is already in progress 109 , unused 110 , Number exceeds the integer range 111 , KV vector is invalid 112 , KV defines scheduled block but scheduling is off 113 , Exp task queue is full 114 , Exp task queue is empty 115 , Exp output queue is full 116 , Exp output queue is empty 117 , Bad KV setting for sensor filter 118 , Bad KV setting 119 , Analog Sensor filter out of range 120 , Analog Sensor filter may contain 0 or 2 blocks 121 , Please wait until Analog Sensor initialized 122 , Motion mode is not supported or with initialization conflict 123 , Profiler queue is full 124 , unused 125 , Personality not loaded 126 , User Program failed - variable out of program size 127 , Modulo range must be positive 128 , Bad variable index in database - internal compiler error 129 , Variable is not an array 130 , Variable name does not exist 131 , Cannot record local variable 132 , Variable is an array 133 , Number of function input arguments is not as expected 134 , Cannot run local label/function with xq command 135 , Frequency identification failed 136 , A float value is not a number 137 , Program already compiled 138 , Position Interpolation buffer underflow 139 , The number of break points exceeds maximal number 140 , An attempt to set/clear break point at the not relevant line 141 , Boot Identity parameters section is not clear 142 , Checksum of data is not correct 143 , Missing boot identity parameters 144 , Numeric Stack underflow 145 , Numeric stack overflow 146 , Expression stack overflow 147 , Executable command within math expression 148 , Nothing in the expression 149 , Unexpected sentence termination 150 , Sentence terminator not found 151 , Parantheses mismatch 152 , Bad operand type 153 , Overflow in a numeric operator 154 , Address is out of data memory segment 155 , Beyond stack range 156 , Bad opcode 157 , No Available program stack 158 , Out of flash memory range 159 , Flash verify error 160 , Program Aborted by another thread 161 , Program is not halted 162 , Badly formatted number 163 , Not enough space in program data segment 164 , EC command (not an error) 165 , An attempt to access flash while busy 166 , The resulted user unit position is out of modulo range (XM[] or YM[]) 167 , Infinite loop in for loop - zero step 168 , Speed too large to start motor 169 , Time out using peripheral.(overflow or busy) 170 , Cannot erase sector in flash memory 171 , Cannot read from flash memory 172 , Cannot write to flash memory 173 , Executable area of program is too large 174 , Program has not been loaded 175 , Cannot write program checksum - clear program (CP) 176 , User code,variables and functions are too large 177 , Capture/Compare conversion error in analog encoder. Require known quad location 178 , CAN bus off 179 , Consumer HB event 180 , DF is not supported in this communication type 181 , Writing to Flash program area, faild 182 , PAL Burn Is In Process or no PAL is burnt or Incompatible PAL version 183 , PAL Burn (PB Command) Is Disabled 184 , Capture option already used by other operation 185 , This element may be modified only when interpolation is not active 186 , Interpolation queue is full 187 , Incorrect Interpolation sub-mode 188 , Gantry slave disable 189 , CAN message was lost, SW buffer overflow 190 , Profile Acceleration is out of range 191 , Motor over temperature 192 , Reserve 193 , Reserve 194 , Reserve 195 , Reserve 196 , Reserve 197 , Reserve 198 , Reserve 199 , Reserve 200 , Main feedback error. Refer to EE[1] 201 , Commutation sequence failed 202 , Encoder-Hall sensor mismatch. Refer to XP[7] 203 , Current limit was exceeded 204 , External inhibit input detected 205 , AC fail: Loss of phase 206 , Digital halls run too fast or disconnected 207 , Speed error limit exceeded. Refer to ER[2] 208 , Position limit error exceeded. Refer to ER[3] 209 , Cannot start motor . Bad data base. Refer to CD 210 , Bad ECAM table 211 , Sensorless is permitted under UM=1 or UM=2 only 212 , Reserve 213 , Reserve 214 , Reserve 215 , Reserve 216 , Cannot find zero position without digital halls 217 , Over speed. Refer to HL[2] 218 , Reserve calculated by Exception code 219 , Reserve calculated by Exception code 220 , Reserve calculated by Exception code 221 , Motor stack 222 , Out of position limits. Refer to HL[3], LL[3] 223 , Numerical overflow 224 , Gantry slave is not enabled 225 , Reserve calculated by Exception code 226 , Reserve calculated by Exception code 227 , Reserve calculated by Exception code 228 , Reserve calculated by Exception code 229 , Cannot start motor because of internal problem 230 , Reserve calculated by Exception code 231 , Reserve calculated by Exception code 232 , Reserve calculated by Exception code 233 , Undervoltage protection 234 , Reserve calculated by Exception code 235 , Overvoltage protection 236 , Reserve calculated by Exception code 237 , Safety switch 238 , Reserve calculated by Exception code 239 , Feedback in error state or not initialized 240 , Reserve calculated by Exception code 241 , Short protection 242 , Reserve calculated by Exception code 243 , Over temperature protection 244 , Reserve calculated by Exception code 245 , Additional inhibit input 245 , None 246 , None 247 , None 248 , None 249 , None 250 , None 251 , None 252 , None 253 , None 254 , None 255 , None
ROOT.Text9: 0x00000001 , Main Feedback error refer to: EE[1] 0x00000002 , Commutation sequence failed 0x00000004 , Encoder - Hall sensor mismatch refer to: CA[111] 0x00000008 , Current limit was Exceeded 0x00000010 , External inhibit input detected 0x00000020 , AC Fail: loss of phase 0x00000040 , Digital Hall run too fast or disconnected 0x00000080 , Speed error limit exceeded refer to: ER[2] 0x00000100 , Position error limit exceeded see ER[3] 0x00000200 , Reserved: Cannot start motor because of bad database refer to: EE[5] or CD 0x00000400 , Gantry Yaw or Stepper closed loop Position error see ER[5] 0x00000800 , Motor Disabled due to a heartbeat violation or loss of frame 0x00001000 , Motor Disabled due to a General fault 0x00003000 , Motor disabled due to Under voltage protection 0x00005000 , Motor disabled due to Overvoltage protection 0x00007000 , Motor disabled by a Safety switch 0x00009000 , Motor disabled by a Feedback error 0x0000B000 , Motor disabled due to Short protection 0x0000D000 , Motor disabled due to Over temperature protection 0x0000F000 , Motor disabled by Additional Inhibit input 0x00010000 , Motor disabled due to motor over temperature 0x00020000 , Over Speed violation refer to: HL[2] 0x00040000 , Reserve: Stack overflow 0x00080000 , Reserve: Null interrupt 0x00100000 , Reserve: Timing error 0x00200000 , Motor stuck 0x00400000 , Out of position limits refer to: HL[3] or LL[3] 0x00800000 , Numerical overflow 0x01000000 , Gantry slave is not enabled 0x02000000 , PWM Sensor input frequency is below the allowed limit 0x04000000 , BEMF observer error 0x08000000 , Gantry master disabled by fault 0x10000000 , Reserved: Cannot tune current offsets 0x20000000 , Cannot start motor because of internal problem 0x40000000 , Reserved 30 0x80000000 , Reserved 31
